strategies.critical_question: Can we prove uniform ρ_p < 1-ε for ALL p|d(k)? This is the single question that, if answered, closes everything via FCQ.
strategies.recommended_action: PRIORITY: LDS + FCQ Combined Attack (score 86.4/100). NEXT STEP: 1. PARTITION primes of d(k) into S_small = {p : ord_p(2) ≤ T} and S_large = {p : ord_p(2) > T}. CRITICAL BLOCKER: CRITICAL: uniform ρ_p bound. Currently ρ_p < 1 proved but no uniformity.
